response: Christopher Nolan’s 2023 drama-history epic “Oppenheimer” runs a hefty 180 minutes and was produced on a $100 million budget, yet it has earned an impressive $952 million at the box office. Boasting an 8.3 rating on IMDb and a 93 percent score on Rotten Tomatoes, the film not only captivated audiences and critics alike but also went on to win the Oscar for Best Picture.
